support.title: Support & Help
support.description: Get help with any issues or questions you might have
support.response_description: We typically respond to all inquiries within 24 hours. For urgent matters, please use the live chat option for immediate assistance.
support.name: Name
support.subject: Subject
support.faq_account_question: How do I verify my account?
support.faq_account_answer: To verify your account, go to your Profile page and click on the 'Verify Account' button. You'll need to provide some personal information and upload copies of your identification documents. Verification typically takes 24-48 hours to process.
support.faq_deposit_question: What payment methods can I use to deposit?
support.faq_deposit_answer: We accept various cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin, and more. You can also use credit/debit cards and bank transfers in some regions. Visit the Wallet page for a complete list of available payment methods.
support.faq_withdraw_answer: Cryptocurrency withdrawals are typically processed within 1 hour, though during peak times it may take up to 24 hours. Bank transfers and other fiat withdrawal methods generally take 1-5 business days depending on your bank and location.
support.faq_bonus_question: How do I claim a bonus?
support.faq_bonus_answer: Bonuses can be claimed from the Rewards page. Some bonuses are automatically applied when you meet certain conditions, while others require you to manually claim them. Check the specific bonus terms for detailed information.
support.faq_kyc_question: Why do I need to complete KYC verification?
support.faq_kyc_answer: KYC (Know Your Customer) verification is required by regulations to prevent fraud, money laundering, and ensure responsible gaming practices. It helps us verify your identity and protect your account security.
support.faq_limits_question: How can I set deposit or betting limits?
support.faq_limits_answer: You can set deposit, loss, and betting limits from your Profile page under 'Responsible Gaming Settings'. These limits can help you manage your gambling activity and promote responsible play.
support.try_different_search: Try different keywords or browse by category
support.live_chat_description: Connect with our support team instantly through live chat for immediate assistance with any questions or issues.
support.contact_success: Thank you for contacting us. We'll respond to your inquiry as soon as possible.

keno.keno_description_1: Keno is a lottery-like gambling game where you choose numbers and wait for them to match with the randomly drawn ones.
keno.keno_description_2: The more matches you get, the higher your prize. The amount you can win depends on the number of hits and the amount bet.
keno.keno_how_to_1: Select between 1 and 10 numbers from the game board.
keno.keno_how_to_2: Set the amount you want to bet.
keno.keno_how_to_3: Choose between American Keno or Fire Keno.
keno.keno_how_to_4: Click 'Play' and wait for the 20 winning numbers to come out.
keno.keno_payouts_description: Payouts vary depending on the number of selections and matches. Fire Keno offers higher multipliers but is more risky.
keno.american_keno_description: Classic version with balanced payouts. Perfect for beginners or players who prefer moderate risk.
keno.fire_keno_description: Version with higher multipliers and payouts. For players seeking thrills and potentially bigger prizes.
keno.select_numbers_to_see_payouts: Select numbers to see possible payouts
